headline: Senate Pursues July Vote on Crypto CLARITY Bill

article.title: Senate leaders push for July passage of CLARITY Act
article.summary: Lawmakers in the US Senate are on state work periods until July 13, giving them only four weeks to address a cryptocurrency market structure bill before another break and possible delays due to campaigning for elections.

headline: Bitcoin Put-Call Ratio Surges to 1-Year High

article.title: Bitcoin put-call ratio hits 1-year high: Are bears preparing for drop to $55K?
article.summary: Rising demand for put options and persistent ETF outflows highlight Bitcoin's weakness despite lower oil prices.

headline: JPMorgan Sturggles to Place 15% Oil Driller Loan

article.title: JPMorgan Struggles to Find Demand for Oil Driller’s 15% Loan
article.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has struggled to attract investor demand for a $775 million loan to a Trump administration-supported oil driller that would pay a hefty 15% interest rate, according to people familiar with the matter.

headline: Gold Slumps 2% on Iran Tensions Ease

article.title: Gold Drops as Traders Watch Iran Tensions for Inflation Outlook
article.summary: Gold fell as the US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other, following tit-for-tat strikes that tested a fragile truce in a war that has fueled global inflationary pressures.

article.title: Strategy (MSTR) Surges Over 12% As Bitcoin-Linked Stocks Have Green Day
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strategy (MSTR) Surges Over 12% As Bitcoin-Linked Stocks Have Green Day
Strategy (MSTR) shares surged 14% at times on Monday after the company unveiled a sweeping capital overhaul, leading a broad rally in bitcoin-linked stocks despite Bitcoin remaining under pressure near $60,000.

headline: JPMorgan Supports US Crypto Bill Ahead of August Vote

article.title: JPMorgan Backs U.S. Crypto Bill, But Puts a Warning Label Front and Center as Senate Eyes August Deadline
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

JPMorgan Backs U.S. Crypto Bill, But Puts a Warning Label Front and Center as Senate Eyes August Deadline

headline: China Launches $10B Crypto Rival to Global Players

article.title: China Has Its Own Mythos Now, Says Qihoo 360 Founder. And One Version Is Free
article.summary: Qihoo 360 unveiled a homegrown vulnerability-hunting AI this week—and Z.ai went further, releasing comparable capabilities as open-weight code anyone can download.

headline: SC Ruling Gives Trump Power Over 5 Regulators

article.title: Supreme Court Says Trump Can Fire SEC, CFTC Commissioners at Will—At a Crucial Moment for Crypto
article.summary: The court overturned a 91-year precedent, allowing President Trump to fire key federal regulators whenever he wishes for almost any reason.

headline: Crypto Bill Faces Uncertain Fate Before Midterms

article.title: TD Cowen says crypto market structure bill passage ‘far from assured’ before midterm election
article.summary: The passage of the crypto market structure bill, or Clarity Act, before the November midterm election is "far from assured," said TD Cowen.

headline: SEC Orders $5M Fines in NanoBit Crypto Case

article.title: SEC wraps up NanoBit crypto fraud case in final judgment, ordering over $5 million in fines
article.summary: The SEC resolved its case against NanoBit after alleging the crypto platform lied to investors and stole their money.

headline: Fed Governor Cook Stays Amid Trump Removal Bid

article.title: Supreme Court blocks Trump from sacking Fed governor Cook
article.summary: Justices say president can fire top regulator in separate decision

headline: Fed Shielded, Markets Await $1Trillion Stimulus Fate

article.title: Supreme Court protects the Federal Reserve, but what about everybody else?
article.summary: While the central bank’s independence was upheld, other agencies were not so lucky
